languages.text: "...возглавлял поход Человечества в регионе, который эта раса называет сектором Каликсис. В отличие от того, что находится в руках его соплеменников, эти останки Друза — подлинные. Все равно в распоряжении Человечества они были бы утрачены через какую-нибудь жалкую пару тысячелетий..."

traits.locale_text: "Мощи святого Друза, возглавившего поход Человечества в регионе, который эта раса называет сектором Каликсис. В отличие от того, что находится в руках его соплеменников, эти останки Друза — подлинные. Все равно в распоряжении Человечества они были бы утрачены через какую-нибудь жалкую+ пару тысячелетий..."

languages.text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."
languages.original_text: "...возглавлял поход Человечества в регионе, который эта раса называет сектором Каликсис. В отличие от того, что находится в руках его соплеменников, эти останки Друза — подлинные. Все равно в распоряжении Человечества они были бы утрачены через какую-нибудь жалкую пару тысячелетий..."

traits.locale_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

"The relics of Saint Drusus, who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

"The relics of Saint Drusus, who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

"...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

languages.text: “……他曾率领人类远征队来到被他们称为卡利西斯星区的地方。不同于他同族所保存的那些遗骸，这些德鲁苏斯的遗骸是真品。若它们一直留在人类手里，不出寥寥千年，便会消失无踪……”
languages.original_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

traits.locale_text: “……他曾率领人类远征队来到被他们称为卡利西斯星区的地方。不同于他同族所保存的那些遗骸，这些德鲁苏斯的遗骸是真品。若它们一直留在人类手里，不出寥寥千年，便会消失无踪……”

languages.text: «... que lideró la campaña de la Humanidad en la región del espacio que esta raza denomina "sector Calixis". Estos restos de Drusus, a diferencia de los que conservan otros de sus congéneres, son genuinos. De haber caído en manos de la Humanidad, se habrían perdido para siempre al cabo de pocos milenios...».
languages.original_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

traits.locale_text: «... que lideró la campaña de la Humanidad en la región del espacio que esta raza denomina "sector Calixis". Estos restos de Drusus, a diferencia de los que conservan otros de sus congéneres, son genuinos. De haber caído en manos de la Humanidad, se habrían perdido para siempre al cabo de pocos milenios...».

languages.text: « ... qui mena la campagne de l'humanité dans la région que ce peuple a surnommée le secteur Calixis. À la différence de bien des autres, ces vestiges sont authentiques. Entre les mains de l'humanité, ils auraient très certainement disparu au bout de quelques millénaires... »
languages.original_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

traits.locale_text: « ... qui mena la campagne de l'humanité dans la région que ce peuple a surnommée le secteur Calixis. À la différence de bien des autres, ces vestiges sont authentiques. Entre les mains de l'humanité, ils auraient très certainement disparu au bout de quelques millénaires... »

languages.text: "... der den Feldzug der Menschheit in die Region führte, die diese Rasse als Calixis-Sektor bezeichnet. Diese Überreste von Drusus sind — im Gegensatz zu vielen anderen — einzigartig. Wären sie im Besitz der Menschheit gewesen, wären sie schon nach wenigen Jahrtausenden verlorengegangen ..."
languages.original_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

traits.locale_text: "... der den Feldzug der Menschheit in die Region führte, die diese Rasse als Calixis-Sektor bezeichnet. Diese Überreste von Drusus sind — im Gegensatz zu vielen anderen — einzigartig. Wären sie im Besitz der Menschheit gewesen, wären sie schon nach wenigen Jahrtausenden verlorengegangen ..."

languages.text: "İnsanlığın yürüttüğü sefere öncülük eden Aziz Drusus'un yadigârları. Drusus'un bu kalıntıları, türdeşlerinin elinde bulunanların aksine gerçek. Eğer İnsanlığın elinde olsalardı birkaç binyıl içinde kaybolup giderlerdi..."
languages.original_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

traits.locale_text: "İnsanlığın yürüttüğü sefere öncülük eden Aziz Drusus'un yadigârları. Drusus'un bu kalıntıları, türdeşlerinin elinde bulunanların aksine gerçek. Eğer İnsanlığın elinde olsalardı birkaç binyıl içinde kaybolup giderlerdi..."

languages.text: 「...この種族がカルシクス・セクターと呼ぶこの地域で人類のキャンペーンを指揮したドルススの遺骨。他の同類のものとは異なり、これは本物である。人類が所持していたならば、わずか数千年で失われていただろう…」
languages.original_text: "...who led Humanity's campaign in the region this race calls the Calixis Sector. These remains of Drusus — unlike those held by others of his kind — are genuine. Had they been in Humanity's possession, they would have been lost after a scant few millennia..."

traits.locale_text: 「...この種族がカルシクス・セクターと呼ぶこの地域で人類のキャンペーンを指揮したドルススの遺骨。他の同類のものとは異なり、これは本物である。人類が所持していたならば、わずか数千年で失われていただろう…」
